text.title: Fork vs Fix Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping the 5-axis total score + overrides to one of 5 actions, each branch referencing a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the library on the monkey-patch ban list (auth, crypto, framework-core, validation)?

conclusion.verdict: action = UPSTREAM-PR (with bridging workaround); FORK-PIN allowed if upstream unresponsive
action = WORKAROUND or UPSTREAM-PR; MONKEY-PATCH forbidden
action must be >= UPSTREAM-PR per strategic override
MONKEY-PATCH via patch-package; record + sunset criterion
FORK-PIN with full hygiene (branch naming, Renovate, rebase cadence, sunset criterion)
REPLACE: swap for an alternative library if ≥2 viable alternatives exist

text.example: ban_listed=false → strategic=true (strategic_dependency=3) → action ≥ UPSTREAM-PR per r3 override; total=12 maps to FORK-PIN per r2 — apply BOTH: FORK-PIN with parallel UPSTREAM-PR.
